llm_analysis.assessment: The changes match the change request by adding the Google Analytics 4 measurement tag with the correct strategy and using the environment variable for the measurement ID.

risks: app/layout.tsx:RootLayout - Potential issues with script loading order affecting page load performance.
app/layout.tsx:RootLayout - Incorrect or missing environment variable NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID could cause analytics to fail.
app/layout.tsx:RootLayout - Conflicts with existing analytics scripts if any are present.

llm_analysis.notes: The implementation assumes the environment variable is correctly set; missing input is not explicitly handled.
No API or contract changes are introduced with this addition.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Consider adding tests to verify the presence of the GA script and its correct configuration.
